release_notes:
🚀 Instant Launch & Stability Patch (1.3.1)

- ⚡ Lightning Fast Startup: Slashed the artificial splash screen wait time by 60%, getting you into your Azkar almost instantly.
- 🛠️ Emulator/Android 13+ Fix: Fixed a critical bug where the app would hang on the native white splash screen due to blocking network and permission requests on startup.
- 🔔 Notification Engine Polish: Minor under-the-hood tweaks to the new V1.3.0 exact alarm system.
